manifest.name: Creation Ledger

name: Creation Ledger

releases.author: chris407x
releases.description:
Creation Ledger 0.1.0 — Initial Release

Creation Ledger is a lightweight Obsidian plugin for capturing ideas, tracking work-in-motion, and resuming creative projects with minimal friction. It introduces a simple capture modal, status-based tracking, and Markdown-first dashboards (including a Kanban board) designed to help you remember what you were working on and where to pick things up again.

This release includes the core plugin files only (main.js, manifest.json, styles.css, and bundled assets). Documentation, examples, and screenshots live in the repository. Creative Ledger is intentionally minimal and file-first, with all data stored as regular Obsidian notes that you fully own and can edit at any time.
